name: Data Model And Migrations
status: current local with mitigated test-isolation finding

results.name: Prisma schema validation
results.command: corepack pnpm --filter api exec prisma validate

results.name: Local migration status
results.command: corepack pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate status
results.notes: Database schema is up to date.

results.name: Full local migration replay
results.command: corepack pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed

results.name: Schema diff generation
results.command: corepack pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate diff --from-empty --to-schema-datamodel prisma\schema.prisma --script

results.name: Wallet data-contract e2e isolated
results.command: corepack pnpm --filter api exec vitest run src/modules/wallets/wallets.e2e.test.ts

results.name: Backtests data-contract e2e isolated
results.command: corepack pnpm --filter api exec vitest run src/modules/backtests/backtests.e2e.test.ts

results.name: Runtime repository contract
results.command: corepack pnpm --filter api exec vitest run src/modules/engine/runtimeSignalLoop.repository.test.ts

results.name: Shared-DB parallel DB pack
results.command: corepack pnpm --filter api exec vitest run src/modules/bots/bots.repository.test.ts src/modules/engine/runtimeSignalLoop.repository.test.ts src/modules/backtests/backtests.e2e.test.ts src/modules/wallets/wallets.e2e.test.ts
results.notes: Shared local database parallel execution caused FK cleanup conflicts such as BacktestRun_userId_fkey; isolated reset-and-run passes.

results.name: Canonical isolated DB audit runner
results.notes: Runner validates schema and migration status, resets before each representative pack, then passes wallets 24/24, backtests 15/15, and runtime repository 2/2.

findings.summary: Prisma schema is valid and local migration history replays cleanly.
Critical partial-index invariants are owned by manual migrations because Prisma schema DSL cannot express them directly.
Market candle cache is scoped by source/exchange context and no longer uses Binance-only storage identity.
DB-backed e2e packs are not safe to run in parallel on one shared local database; use audit:data:db-isolated for representative reset-and-run proof.
Production migration status and backup/restore freshness were not rerun in this local audit.
